extension.description: A simple extension to toggle and configure proxy settings inside VSCode with a visual panel
command.openPanel.title: Proxy Toggle: Open Proxy Panel
command.openSettings.title: Proxy Toggle: Open Proxy Settings
view.container.title: Proxy Toggle
view.title: Proxy Settings
config.title: Proxy Toggle
config.enabled.description: Whether the proxy is enabled or disabled
config.proxySupport.description: VSCode proxy support mode: off, on, fallback, or override
config.noProxy.description: Hosts excluded from proxy (comma-separated, e.g. localhost,127.0.0.1)
config.useLocalProxyConfiguration.descri: Use local proxy configuration during remote development
config.networkInterfaceCheckInterval.des: Http > Experimental: Network Interface Check Interval - Interval in seconds to check network interface changes to invalidate proxy cache. Set to -1 to disable.
config.systemCertificatesV2.description: Http > Experimental: System Certificates V2 - Enable experimental loading of CA certificates from the OS using a more general approach
config.fetchAdditionalSupport.descriptio: Http: Fetch Additional Support - Extend Node.js fetch with proxy support and system certificates
config.systemCertificates.description: Http: System Certificates - Load CA certificates from the OS. On Windows and macOS, a window reload is required after turning this off.
config.systemCertificatesNode.descriptio: Http: System Certificates Node - Load system certificates using Node.js built-in support. Reload the window after changing this setting.
runtime.tooltipOff:
Proxy is OFF
Click to open settings
